/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -Wp,-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-base/unity/src=/usr/src/debug/unity -flto=auto -DGNOME_DESKTOP_USE_UNSTABLE_API -std=c++14 -fno-permissive -Wall -Wcast-align -Wempty-body -Wformat-security -Winit-self -Warray-bounds -Wno-error=deprecated-declarations -Wno-error=unused-local-typedefs -fPIC -Wall -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wno-deprecated-declarations  -Wno-subobject-linkage -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,-zdefs -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/unityshell.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libunityshell.so -o libunityshell.so CMakeFiles/unityshell.dir/src/CompoundGestureRecognizer.cpp.o
